description_long: This is a pair of futuristic, armored gloves with a robust, segmented design and a metallic gray finish. The gloves feature multiple overlapping plates, providing enhanced protection and a mechanical appearance, with visible bolts and reinforced knuckle guards. Black lightning bolt motifs and red text are present on the outer plates, adding a distinctive, high-tech aesthetic. The surface shows signs of wear and grime, suggesting heavy use or exposure to urban environments. The gloves appear to be constructed from a combination of hard synthetic materials and metal, with some areas possibly padded for comfort. The overall design is ergonomic, with articulated joints for finger movement and reinforced areas for impact resistance.
description: Futuristic armored gloves with segmented metallic plates, black lightning motifs, and red text, designed for protection and durability in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced knuckle guards, overlapping plates, and prominent lightning motifs on the outer surface.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the segmented armor, visible bolts, and intricate mechanical details on the back and sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ergonomic shape, articulated joints, and additional protective plating on the back of the gloves.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the layered construction, red text, and the robust, high-tech design.
attribute_logo: black lightning bolt motif, red text markings
attribute_pattern: lightning motif with text and segmented armor pattern
